name: Oranges and Cucumbers in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream, mint, salt, sugar, and garlic in a bowl.
2. Add the sectioned oranges and thinly sliced cucumber to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly combined.
4. Chill the mixture thoroughly before serving.
5. Serve over salad greens.
